<!-- Generated by AI on 05/04/2026 -->

# Product Roadmap

## Phase 1: Foundation — Core Capture & Storage

**Goal:** Enable users to log thoughts and store them securely. Establish the full-stack skeleton with authentication, data persistence, and a minimal UI.
**Success Criteria:** A logged-in user can submit a thought via the UI, and it is stored in Azure Table Storage (or in-memory) and retrievable through the API.

### Features

- [ ] Project scaffolding — .NET 10 API + React 19 + Vite SPA wired together `XS`
- [ ] Azure EasyAuth integration with local dev bypass via `LocalDevCurrentUserService` `S`
- [ ] Azure Table Storage repository with in-memory fallback `S`
- [ ] `POST /api/thoughts` — Create a thought entry (text, timestamp, userId) `S`
- [ ] `GET /api/thoughts` — List thoughts for the authenticated user (paginated) `S`
- [ ] `DELETE /api/thoughts/{id}` — Delete a thought entry `XS`
- [ ] Minimal frontend: thought input field + submission form + thought list `M`

### Dependencies

- Azure App Service provisioned with EasyAuth enabled for production
- Azure Storage Account created and connection string available

---

## Phase 2: Intelligence Layer — Tagging & Sentiment

**Goal:** Transform raw thought text into structured data by applying the rule-based tagging engine and sentiment/intensity analysis pipeline.
**Success Criteria:** Every submitted thought is automatically tagged with one or more categories and assigned a sentiment value and intensity score, stored alongside the thought record.

### Features

- [ ] Text preprocessing service (normalization, tokenization, stop-word removal) `S`
- [ ] Rule-based tagging engine with keyword dictionaries for: Trading, Work, Health, Learning, Personal, Stress, Ideas `M`
- [ ] Multi-tag support per thought entry `S`
- [ ] Sentiment analysis service (Positive / Negative / Neutral) with emotional keyword scoring `M`
- [ ] Intensity scoring based on keyword weight configuration `S`
- [ ] `GET /api/thoughts/{id}` — Return thought with tags, sentiment, and intensity `XS`
- [ ] Update thought list UI to display tags and sentiment badges `S`

### Dependencies

- Phase 1 complete
- Keyword dictionary content finalized (Trading, Work, Health, Learning, Personal, Stress, Ideas domains)

---

## Phase 3: Pattern Detection & Insights

**Goal:** Surface meaningful behavioral patterns from accumulated thought data and convert them into human-readable insight messages.
**Success Criteria:** After logging 20+ thoughts, a user can see their top thought categories, sentiment trends by hour/day, and at least 3 auto-generated insight messages.

### Features

- [ ] Frequency analysis engine — dominant thought categories over configurable time windows `M`
- [ ] Time-based trend detection — hour-of-day and day-of-week thought distribution `M`
- [ ] Repetition/similarity detection — identify recurring thought clusters using keyword overlap `M`
- [ ] Trigger identification — correlate negative sentiment spikes with specific domains `M`
- [ ] Insight generation layer — template-based human-readable insight messages `M`
- [ ] `GET /api/insights` — Return current insights for the authenticated user `S`
- [ ] Frontend insights panel — display generated insight messages `S`

### Dependencies

- Phase 2 complete
- Sufficient thought volume for meaningful pattern detection (documented minimum threshold)

---

## Phase 4: Weekly Reflection & Visualization Dashboard

**Goal:** Deliver a complete self-reflection experience with weekly aggregate summaries and an interactive visualization dashboard.
**Success Criteria:** Users can view a weekly reflection report and interact with category/sentiment/trend charts on the dashboard.

### Features

- [ ] Weekly reflection aggregation service — thought distribution, sentiment trends, behavioral patterns per week `L`
- [ ] `GET /api/reflections/weekly` — Return current or historical weekly reflection reports `S`
- [ ] Optional AI-generated natural language weekly summary (external API integration, opt-in) `L`
- [ ] Dashboard page with thought distribution pie/bar chart `M`
- [ ] Sentiment trend line chart over time `M`
- [ ] Peak activity period heatmap (hour × day) `M`
- [ ] Pattern highlights section — top tags, top triggers, most repeated thoughts `S`

### Dependencies

- Phase 3 complete
- Chart library integrated (Recharts or MUI X Charts)
- Optional: External AI API key configured for natural language summaries

---

## Phase 5: Advanced Intelligence & Future Enhancements

**Goal:** Layer optional AI-powered capabilities on top of the deterministic engine to enhance similarity detection, personalization, and cross-domain insights.
**Success Criteria:** Embedding-based similarity search returns meaningfully related thoughts; cognitive bias signals are surfaced in the insights panel.

### Features

- [ ] Embedding-based similarity detection for recurring thought themes (Azure OpenAI or local model) `XL`
- [ ] Voice-to-text input support on the frontend `XL`
- [ ] Personalized recommendations based on detected patterns `L`
- [ ] Cognitive bias detection signals (overthinking, catastrophizing, recency bias) `XL`
- [ ] Cross-domain correlation insights (e.g., trading stress → evening negativity) `L`
- [ ] Thought search — full-text search across historical entries `M`
- [ ] Export to CSV / JSON for personal data portability `S`

### Dependencies

- Phase 4 complete
- Azure OpenAI resource or compatible embedding endpoint available (for embedding features)
- Voice input requires browser Web Speech API support or Whisper integration
